news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Canara Bank's ratings: Basel III Tier II Bonds (AAA Stable), Tier I Bonds (AA Stable), Certificate of Deposit (A1).
Ratings reflect Canara's sovereign ownership, strong profitability, robust deposit franchise, and improved asset quality.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Canara Bank's ratings: Basel III Tier II Bonds (AAA Stable), Tier I Bonds (AA Stable), Certificate of Deposit (A1).
Ratings reflect Canara's sovereign ownership, strong profitability, robust deposit franchise, and improved asset quality.

news.title:
Canara Bank sees 13.3% rise in open interest, indicating increased market activity.
Despite a 0.6% price dip on Feb 26, strong volumes reflect mixed trader sentiments.
news.summary:
Canara Bank sees 13.3% rise in open interest, indicating increased market activity.
Despite a 0.6% price dip on Feb 26, strong volumes reflect mixed trader sentiments.

news.title:
Govt to pilot CBDC-based food subsidy under PMGKAY in Puducherry.
Launch scheduled for 26 February, marking a shift in subsidy delivery.
news.summary:
Govt to pilot CBDC-based food subsidy under PMGKAY in Puducherry.
Launch scheduled for 26 February, marking a shift in subsidy delivery.

news.title:
Canara Bank plans to raise ₹5,000 crore via Tier 2 bonds on Feb 26, 2026, to boost capital and business growth.
The issue includes a ₹2,000 crore base size and ₹3,000 crore green shoe option to meet investor demand.
news.summary:
Canara Bank plans to raise ₹5,000 crore via Tier 2 bonds on Feb 26, 2026, to boost capital and business growth.
The issue includes a ₹2,000 crore base size and ₹3,000 crore green shoe option to meet investor demand.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Canara Bank surged 3.2% on 20 Feb 2026, hitting 154.25 intraday.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.7% gain, showcasing strong PSU banking performance.
news.summary:
Canara Bank surged 3.2% on 20 Feb 2026, hitting 154.25 intraday.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.7% gain, showcasing strong PSU banking performance.

news.title:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.
news.summary:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.

news.title:
Foreign investors are increasing stakes in Indian state-run banks like SBI, Bank of Baroda, Canara Bank, and PNB.
These banks attract inflows due to better valuations and strong growth prospects, bucking the broader equity pullback.
news.summary:
Foreign investors are increasing stakes in Indian state-run banks like SBI, Bank of Baroda, Canara Bank, and PNB.
These banks attract inflows due to better valuations and strong growth prospects, bucking the broader equity pullback.

news.title:
Bank credit growth at 12% outpaced 10% deposit rise during April-Jan.
System liquidity tightens as lenders increase loan disbursements.
news.summary:
Bank credit growth at 12% outpaced 10% deposit rise during April-Jan.
System liquidity tightens as lenders increase loan disbursements.

news.title:
India Ratings affirmed Canara Bank's 'IND AAA/Stable' rating for infrastructure bonds and 'IND AA/Stable' for Basel III AT1 bonds.
Canara Bank's improved CET1 to 12.37% and reducing NPAs reflect strong financial stability; CASA ratio expected to improve to 32% in FY26.
news.summary:
India Ratings affirmed Canara Bank's 'IND AAA/Stable' rating for infrastructure bonds and 'IND AA/Stable' for Basel III AT1 bonds.
Canara Bank's improved CET1 to 12.37% and reducing NPAs reflect strong financial stability; CASA ratio expected to improve to 32% in FY26.

news.title:
CBI court dismisses Mehul Choksi's plea against summons in Canara Bank consortium's Rs 55.3 crore loan fraud case.
CBI alleges misuse of sanctioned loans by Bezel Jewellery, causing losses to Canara Bank, Bank of Maharashtra.
news.summary:
CBI court dismisses Mehul Choksi's plea against summons in Canara Bank consortium's Rs 55.3 crore loan fraud case.
CBI alleges misuse of sanctioned loans by Bezel Jewellery, causing losses to Canara Bank, Bank of Maharashtra.

news.title:
Canara Bank's valuation shifted from fair to attractive, with a P/E of 6.7 and P/BV of 1.2.
MarketsMojo downgraded Canara Bank from 'Buy' to 'Hold' on 28 Jan 2026 despite mixed price performance.
news.summary:
Canara Bank's valuation shifted from fair to attractive, with a P/E of 6.7 and P/BV of 1.2.
MarketsMojo downgraded Canara Bank from 'Buy' to 'Hold' on 28 Jan 2026 despite mixed price performance.

news.title:
ED restored Rs 45 crore worth of properties to Canara Bank after court order.
Pushpendra Singh and others misused vehicle loans, cheating lenders of Rs 18.3 crore.
news.summary:
ED restored Rs 45 crore worth of properties to Canara Bank after court order.
Pushpendra Singh and others misused vehicle loans, cheating lenders of Rs 18.3 crore.

news.title:
CBI secures conviction for ex-Canara Bank officer and borrower in fraud case.
The accused were found guilty of conspiracy, cheating, forgery, and misconduct.
news.summary:
CBI secures conviction for ex-Canara Bank officer and borrower in fraud case.
The accused were found guilty of conspiracy, cheating, forgery, and misconduct.

news.title:
Canara Bank plans to raise Rs 4,000 crore via tier-2 bonds by March.
The bank targets 13% growth in advances, with board approval for Rs 6,000 crore.
news.summary:
Canara Bank plans to raise Rs 4,000 crore via tier-2 bonds by March.
The bank targets 13% growth in advances, with board approval for Rs 6,000 crore.

news.title:
Canara Bank focuses on retail, agri, and MSME loans to protect profitability.
The bank adjusts its loan mix amid selective corporate credit and rate-cut impact.
news.summary:
Canara Bank focuses on retail, agri, and MSME loans to protect profitability.
The bank adjusts its loan mix amid selective corporate credit and rate-cut impact.

news.title:
Canara Bank's NIMs expected to remain stable at 2.45-2.5%, driven by repo-linked portfolio repricing.
Strong RAM-led credit growth at 13.59% with retail, agri, and MSME sectors showing high growth; ROA at 1.13%.
news.summary:
Canara Bank's NIMs expected to remain stable at 2.45-2.5%, driven by repo-linked portfolio repricing.
Strong RAM-led credit growth at 13.59% with retail, agri, and MSME sectors showing high growth; ROA at 1.13%.

news.title: Canara Bank revises credit growth forecast to 13.5%, up from 10.5%.
news.summary: Canara Bank revises credit growth forecast to 13.5%, up from 10.5%.

news.title: Canara Bank's Q3 fresh slippages decreased to 18.5B from 20B QoQ.
news.summary: Canara Bank's Q3 fresh slippages decreased to 18.5B from 20B QoQ.

news.title:
Canara Bank's Board approved its unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 2025.
Net profit for Q3 stood at ₹5,155.1 crore, with total income at ₹39,880.96 crore.
news.summary:
Canara Bank's Board approved its unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 2025.
Net profit for Q3 stood at ₹5,155.1 crore, with total income at ₹39,880.96 crore.
